textByHash.c5d03dfff48a74be7d0a63dbb7e1edaaf99d7327: The.. poison.. it is all.. too much... My head... will not... stop spinning...
textByHash.cc29912f8b612a38b633ae82bb1d3faa26326bfa: What... what did that spider... DO to me? I... I feel so weak... I can hardly... think at all...
textByHash.0cac5da57563a168ae26f8ce575ad81d65f36d46: Ooooh... thank you... Wow! That's completely cured me!
textByHash.a74d65c9c9cb7cae1a22097c2047c4798efc0a5c: You have? Unfortunately I don't have it any more... in my attempts to slay the fiendish Chronozon, the blood demon, I lost a lot of equipment in
textByHash.3eef408e504546b24b0f5e132314a48d756a1596: our last battle when he bested me and forced me away from his den. He probably still has it now.
textByHash.c1c873a8a22ac748c043670ff57d15711d4730bf: Well... you will have to be a skilled Mage to defeat him, and my powers are not good enough yet. You will need to hit him once with each of the four elemental spells of death
textByHash.dbdeb89909dae9d0c61bd62e4993727e62ed1b19: The fiend has made his lair in the Wilderness below the Obelisk of Air.
textByHash.59a5b77cc1e0e5d1af2bfb13777b47ca988b9a5d: Those accursed poison spiders that surround the entrance to Chronozon's lair... I must have taken a nip from one of them as I attempted to make my escape.
textByHash.0bc14ebba357c2c0b36fc698298a05f66bd43bca: My thanks for the assistance adventurer.
textByHash.3db2644df471d2f9539a6ac827b8782831f17c8f: Well done! Now return it to my father!
textByHash.d3248fff438edd5237aa8daddb8bfbe49ebc056a: Hello again. My family now considers you a hero.
textByHash.3792765eab51296cf7e9abf8e895ae14741616e4: And right he is at that. Although my skill with Death Rune magiks was not great enough to defeat Chronozon, I am adequately skilled at Chaos Rune magiks.
textByHash.133e933d9d5becfc686d6bc925f6c698c7c47e7d: If you give me your gauntlets I will bestow upon them some of my power, and make any bolt spells you wish to cast more effective.
textByHash.a94feafe3e7e06c6d899136dbdeef8f48c518a4b: I doubt they will offer anything as useful as my magical boost, but as you wish.
textByHash.ccd21e0638314256dd1a6d57e55052151389a9fc: I am so very tired... Leave me be... to rest...
textByHash.8785d49277167880f0d8faf339fd2e8ba2758cb6: Yes well... Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.59181542a13364f5c104c0269c07a3efdbefd325: Yes certainly, though it will cost you 25,000 coins.
textByHash.75ea357bff0d2450ec6f0d5eba7f284ec3efc839: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.
textByHash.6d55d7559fd8705b9ea9000ddb51bb96e8d3a60c: If you want, I'll provide you with as many pairs of Chaos gauntlets as you wish to say thanks!
textByHash.7c335b9edcc45ab1d55ec891b429f029a1052e53: You will find the power of bolt spells increases substantially whilst wearing these gauntlets.
textByHash.389a63bd227fa9f36ddf04fc8ecb62666fb262b5: Actually, come to think of it...
textByHash.fc8565787e9f7cbd65f20682aa8019e9b8feb55e: I've been having this issue. You see the lady I seek is trapped up the top of a very large tower of a very large castle, and has been for all of her life so far.
textByHash.bf82ee8fa5f3bf0498dbf492f46170115aa94c47: There is but one problem, a fierce dragon circles the castle, breathing fire at anyone who dares go near.
textByHash.cffff22343a33493f6fa126f56cb5d14d7baed0c: Ha ha! You would believe anything. That was just a children's story!
textByHash.95ffc55a9c5c8bcefab403324597a9780fc4311b: Everything is fantastic ! You adventurers really do seem to love quests, but I do not have one for you today.
textByHash.3fb79948626991122bb8a5c49515f3b3a717a255: I find that very insulting . You do not need to remind me of your superior skills. Leave me be.
